+    val_auc = ckpt.get('val_auc', 0.5)

+    return model, val_auc

+

+def predict(model, skill_ids, corrects, lengths, device):

+    model.eval()

+    with torch.no_grad():

+        logits = model(skill_ids.to(device), corrects.to(device), lengths.to(device))

+        pred_logits = logits[:, 1:]

+        probs = torch.sigmoid(pred_logits)

+        return probs.cpu()
